title: TT20Forged (TPS Fixer)
description:
unofficial forge port of TT20.

TT20Forged helps reduce lag by optimizing how ticks work when the server's TPS is low.
body:
### **⚠️ NO LONGER SUPPORTED! ⚠️** please use official version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/tt20)
# ✨ TT20Forged ✨ **Bringing modern tick optimization to the Forge ecosystem.**
**TT20Forged** is an unofficial Forge port of the brilliant **[TT20](https.modrinth.com/mod/tt20)** mod by **[JXSnack](https.modrinth.com/user/JXSnack)**. Is your server struggling to keep up? Does lag spike when the Ticks Per Second ($TPS$) drops? TT20Forged addresses this by dynamically optimizing the game's tick processing, ensuring a smoother and more responsive gameplay experience, even under heavy load.
### 🚀 Showcase See the magic for yourself! Witness the performance difference in showcase video. **[▶️ Watch the Showcase Video](https://github.com/JXSnack/test/blob/main/tt20-video.mp4)**
### ⚠️ **CRITICAL NOTICE: PLEASE READ** ⚠️ This is an **UNOFFICIAL** port. The original author, JXSnack, is **NOT** associated with this version. **DO NOT report any bugs or issues you find while using TT20Forged to the original author.** This port is maintained separately, and they are not responsible for any problems that may arise from its use.
### ✅ **Supported Versions** * Minecraft Forge: `1.20.1`
### 🐞 **Bug Reports & Feedback** This port is still in its early stages and has not been fully tested. If you encounter any bugs, crashes, or unexpected behavior, your feedback is invaluable! Please report all issues directly to the **[TT20Forged GitHub Issues Page](https://github.com/sj-hub9796/TT20Forged/issues)**.
### 🙏 **Acknowledgements** A massive thank you to **[JXSnack](https://modrinth.com/user/JXSnack)** for creating the original [TT20](https://modrinth.com/mod/tt20) and its incredible optimization logic. This project would not be possible without their foundational work.
